title: SystemVerilog - ports without type declaration not equivalent to logic

features.name: untyped port with always_comb assignment
features.description: Code should include a port declaration without explicit type used in always_comb block, where the port is used as an lvalue
features.snippet: module test(output a, input b); always_comb a = b; endmodule

features.name: logic typed port with always_comb assignment
features.description: Code should include a port explicitly declared as logic type used in always_comb block, where the port is used as an lvalue
features.snippet: module test(output logic a, input b); always_comb a = b; endmodule

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance; port default type bug is a SV data model issue
